messages.content: can you re-write the below paragraph as a objective of a resume for retail assistant?

Objective: 
Highly motivated and customer-oriented individual seeking a position as a retail assistant. Committed to delivering exceptional customer service and ensuring a pleasant shopping experience for customers. Possessing a strong knowledge of products and inventory management, along with excellent communication and organizational skills. Proactive team player with a friendly and approachable demeanor, aiming to contribute to the growth and success of the retail establishment.

Looking for a retail assistant position that could use my customer serving experience, details attention, hardworking and can-do attitude, and bilingual background to help the company achieve its goal of excellence. I have a strong desire to learn and ability to achieve career goals and development.

Objective: 
Seeking a retail assistant position that enables me to utilize my experience in customer service, attention to detail, strong work ethic, and bilingual background to contribute towards the company's pursuit of excellence. Eager to expand my knowledge and skills while accomplishing personal career goals and fostering professional growth.
can you to mix with these two abjective you just wrote?

Objective:
Highly motivated and customer-oriented individual seeking a retail assistant position that could effectively utilize my customer service experience, attention to detail, hardworking and can-do attitude, as well as my bilingual background, to help the company achieve excellence. Committed to delivering exceptional customer service and ensuring a pleasant shopping experience for customers. Possessing a strong desire to learn, grow, and achieve career goals, while actively contributing to the success and development of the organization.

Objective: 
Motivated retail assistant seeking a position to leverage customer service experience, attention to detail, strong work ethic, can-do attitude, and bilingual background to contribute to the company's pursuit of excellence. Committed to delivering exceptional service, ensuring customer satisfaction, and actively seeking career growth and development opportunities.
rewrite: Possessing a strong desire to learn, grow, and achieve career goals, while actively contributing to the success and development of the organization.

Objective:
Motivated retail assistant seeking a position to leverage customer service experience, attention to detail, strong work ethic, can-do attitude, and bilingual background to contribute to the company's pursuit of excellence. Committed to delivering exceptional service, ensuring customer satisfaction, and actively contributing to the success and development of the organization while pursuing personal growth and career advancement.

rewrite:Office administrator| JS international Pty Ltd| Jun. 2022-Current   
•	Responsible for customer's online orders, telephone consultation and product quotation
•	Producing and following up all artworks related to order production
•	Document processing and personnel communication for daily office work

Objective: 

Office Administrator with a focus on customer service and efficient office operations. Experienced in handling online orders, providing telephone consultations, and preparing product quotations. Proficient in producing and managing artwork for order production. Skilled in document processing and maintaining effective communication within the organization. Seeking an opportunity to utilize these skills and contribute to the smooth functioning and productivity of JS International Pty Ltd.

Work Experience: 

Office Administrator | JS International Pty Ltd | Jun. 2022-Current

• Manage customer's online orders, providing excellent service and ensuring accurate product quotations.
• Proficiently generate and follow up on all artwork requirements linked to order production.
• Efficiently handle document processing and maintain effective communication for daily office tasks.

rewrite this work experience:Office administrator| Wise earth property group| Jan. 2022-Jun. 2022                                
•	Responsible for answering customer rental questions
•	Managing and maintaining customer information in system
•	Editing and updating advertisements for sale and rental properties on platforms 
•	Answering phone calls and assisting in office daily affairs

Work Experience: 

Office Administrator | Wise Earth Property Group | Jan. 2022-Jun. 2022

• Provided prompt and accurate responses to customer inquiries regarding rentals.
• Efficiently managed and updated customer information in the system.
• Skillfully edited and maintained advertisements for properties available for sale and rent across various platforms.
• Answered incoming phone calls and provided support in daily office operations.

Waitress | Middleborough Latte Cafe | Feb. 2019-Jun. 2019 Responsible for customer service in a friendly manner, helping customers with any of their needs, sample meal making, cleaning and maintaining the in-store environment.
I gained the trust of my boss and some clients through hard work and warm and patient service.

Work Experience: 

Waitress | Middleborough Latte Cafe | Feb. 2019-Jun. 2019

• Provided friendly and attentive customer service, ensuring a positive dining experience.
• Assisted customers with their needs, including menu recommendations and addressing any inquiries.
• Prepared sample meals to enhance customer satisfaction and promote new menu items.
• Maintained cleanliness and tidiness of the in-store environment to uphold hygiene standards.
• Developed a reputation for hard work and delivering warm and patient service, earning the trust of my employer and building strong relationships with clients.
